overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a sandy waterfront beneath highway overpasses, through an abandoned parking garage with graffiti, and up to an elevated concrete promenade lined with palm trees in a futuristic urban setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy waterfront path with wooden pier

agents.ego_description: walking along a sandy coastal path beneath a concrete overpass structure

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass casting shadows on the right side
long wooden pier extending into the ocean with palm trees along its length
dry coastal vegetation and grasses growing on the sandy dunes
calm ocean water visible beyond the sandy beach

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny sandy waterfront path with a wooden pier extending into the ocean in the distance. Dry coastal vegetation lines the left side while a massive concrete overpass structure looms on the right, casting partial shadows across the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded area beneath highway overpass with city views

events.description: moves from direct sunlight into deep shadow beneath the concrete overpass
turns to face the water revealing the distant city skyline with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and looking out toward the city skyline across the water

entered.detail: thick concrete support pillars holding up the highway above
futuristic city buildings with glowing neon signage visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the deep shadow beneath the highway overpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to diffused shade. The view opens to reveal a futuristic city skyline with neon billboards across the water, supported by massive concrete pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach beneath elevated highways

events.description: exits the shadow of the overpass back into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shore toward a concrete building structure beneath the highway

entered.detail: elevated highway ramp passing overhead with vehicles visible above
multi-level concrete parking structure with glass facade sections

segments.scene_description: Emerging back into bright sunlight, the scene reveals a wide sandy area beneath elevated highway overpasses. A large concrete building with parking levels becomes visible on the left as the camera approaches the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to abandoned parking garage beneath highway

events.description: approaches the entrance to the covered parking structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the dark entrance of the parking garage beneath the highway ramps

entered.detail: concrete vehicle ramp leading up to the highway level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper beneath the highway infrastructure, approaching the dark entrance of an abandoned parking garage. The ground remains sandy with scattered debris, and concrete ramps lead up to the highway level on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned covered parking garage with concrete pillars

events.description: enters the covered parking garage from the beach area
passes white graffiti reading 'DIE DIE DIE' spray-painted on a concrete pillar

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit parking garage examining abandoned vehicles and graffiti

notable_agents.action: abandoned green sports car with chrome details parked near a pillar

entered.detail: enclosed concrete parking garage with low ceiling and exposed beams
fluorescent tube lights hanging from the concrete ceiling providing dim illumination
white spray-painted text reading 'DIE DIE DIE' on a concrete support pillar
concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward to the next level

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a dark, enclosed parking garage illuminated by sparse fluorescent lights. Abandoned cars are scattered throughout, including a distinctive green sports car. Graffiti reading 'DIE DIE DIE' marks a concrete pillar as the camera moves toward a staircase at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending from garage to promenade

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs from the parking level
emerges from the dark garage into bright sunlight at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs from the parking garage to the upper promenade level

entered.detail: metal pipe handrails along the left side of the staircase
open concrete platform at the top of the stairs overlooking the area

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a concrete stairway with metal handrails, transitioning from the dark artificial lighting of the garage to bright natural sunlight. The stairs lead to an open concrete landing with views of the highway overpass and ocean beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with palm trees

events.description: passes a green dumpster and scattered trash bags on the concrete walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated promenade overlooking the water and city

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the promenade
large green metal dumpster sitting on the concrete walkway
black garbage bags and scattered debris along the promenade edge
metal safety railing along the right edge overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide, sunlit elevated promenade with palm trees lining the path. A green dumpster and scattered trash bags indicate neglect. The camera walks along the concrete walkway with metal railings overlooking the water, with the highway overpass now visible in the distance and futuristic city buildings rising on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunny waterfront into the oppressive shadows of massive urban infrastructure. It begins on a sandy coastal path lined with dry vegetation, moving toward a distant wooden pier while a concrete overpass looms overhead. As the camera glides beneath the highway, the bright light shifts to diffused shade, revealing a futuristic city skyline and neon billboards framed by towering concrete pillars. The scene then emerges back into the sunlight across a wide sandy expanse before turning toward a large concrete parking structure on the left. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the highway's underbelly, passing scattered debris and concrete ramps as it approaches the dark entrance of an abandoned garage.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive gloom of an underground garage into the bright, open expanse of a futuristic coastal promenade. It begins in a dark, enclosed parking structure illuminated by sparse fluorescent lights, passing abandoned cars and a concrete pillar marked with graffiti as it moves toward a distant staircase. As the camera ascends the concrete stairs, the artificial shadows give way to blinding natural sunlight, opening up to a landing that reveals a highway overpass and the ocean beyond. The scene then expands onto a wide, sunlit elevated walkway lined with palm trees and scattered trash, moving along metal railings that overlook the water. Finally, the path continues forward with the highway overpass receding into the distance while futuristic city buildings rise prominently to the right.
